articles.author: Courtney Cronin
articles.title: Bears edge closer to move for new stadium in northwest Indiana - ESPN
articles.description: The Bears took a significant step toward leaving Chicago on Friday after the team's board of directors voted Thursday to advance their stadium development plans in nearby Hammond, Indiana.
articles.content:
CHICAGO -- The Bears took a significant step toward leaving Illinois on Friday.
The Bears' board of directors voted Thursday to advance their stadium development in Hammond, Indiana, with the exact … [+3740 chars]
